title: アオハル杯2戦目・ハッピーカムカム！

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Happiness has come! Fortune is here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Everyone did amazingly, as I knew they would!
Our will found a way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: All the same, the Unity Cup isn't over yet.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's dash to a shrine and pray for victory in the
next round too!
